description_long: This house is situated on a sloped plot with a dark, multi-faceted roof and a mix of black and white exterior walls. The property is surrounded by lush, mature trees and landscaped greenery, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. A curved driveway or road borders the property, and a fenced perimeter encloses the yard. The house features a main structure with a visible gable roof and an attached section, possibly a garage or secondary living space. Outdoor amenities include a small pool or water feature and a patio area with seating. The overall design blends modern and traditional elements, with clean lines and a strong contrast in exterior colors.
description: A modern-traditional house with a dark gable roof, black and white exterior, surrounded by trees and landscaping on a sloped lot.
description_view_0: Front and side of the house with the main entrance, patio, and landscaping visible, along with the driveway and fencing.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by dense trees and the curved road, with less of the house structure visible.
description_view_2: Rear and side of the house, showing the sloped terrain, more of the roof, and the backyard area.
description_view_3: Top-down view highlighting the roof structure, driveway, and the arrangement of trees and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of standard and large windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, steps, and a prominent door, accented by landscaping and fencing.
